scripts.build: pnpm --filter @hesper/shared build && tsc -p tsconfig.build.json && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const path=require('path'); for (const p of [path.join(process.cwd(),'dist/packages'), path.join(process.cwd(),'dist/__tests__')]) { try { fs.rmSync(p, { recursive: true, force: true }); } catch (error) { if (!error || typeof error !== 'object' || !('code' in error) || (error.code !== 'ENOENT' && error.code !== 'EPERM')) throw error; } }"
